text: Many people think creativity is something only humans can do, but AI is now creating art, music, and writing that surprises us. AI-generated paintings can look like famous artists' styles, and computer programmes compose symphonies that sound professional. In writing, AI can produce poems, stories, and news articles. However, there is an important difference: human creativity comes from emotions and personal experience, while machine creativity is based on patterns and data. AI doesn’t have feelings or intentions, but it can help people explore new ideas. Some artists use AI as a tool to inspire their work, blending human imagination with machine power.
